Divine Purpose  

Description

1: Decrease Mana by 3 per tick
2: Increase Hitpoints by 8 per tick.

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 1 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 4.5 Recast Time: 6
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 20 Deletable: No
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Self
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: A flame of divine purpose compels you.
Cast on other: Soandso 's eyes are filled by the flame of a divine purpose.
Effect Fades: The divine flame leaves.

Game Description

Surrounds you with divine purpose, regenerating your hit points while slowly draining your mana for 15.0 mins.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Divine Purpose

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Divine Purpose
ClassLevel
PAL37
Expansion:

Duration:
15.0 mins
  • Comments (17)
  • Sold By (3)
  • Screenshots (1)
Post Comment
Usefulness
QuoteReply
# Apr 06 2021 at 1:49 PM Rating: Decent
RaizTFC
4 posts
The purpose of this spell is not to use over your heals. It's meant to be used with your heals. Pretty basic concept, that I see people not grasping. Before battle you apply Divine purpose. This acts as a Regen based heal but slowly drains Mana. With crack it'll merely slow down your Mana Regen in combat, with c2/3 the loss is negligible. Plus it stacks with Dru/Sha regens only amplifying it, slowing down the need for a heal, or buying you time for a heal to land. It's not meant to be used in place of healing as I saw someone suggest, it's meant to be used in conjunction with. It's basically a very low permanent hot (which I say bc it's continuously draining Mana). Someone also mentioned that it will drain your mana still at 100 health.. yeah, turn it off. Cast when a pull is inc. if you are the puller I'm assuming you got a speed buff from someone, run back to camp and cast. There's often a small wait for mobs to actually catch up.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2007 at 11:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591898016665
6 posts
Iceland location:

4630.12, 1314.43, 72.54

It is in one of the igloos just south west of the succor point.

Happy hunting!
▲ Page top
This spell is bad
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2006 at 8:31 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1627863539012
View User Forum
197 posts
First it cost 3mana to heal for 8HP for a ratio of 2.67 HP/per mana. And mana preservation or IMp healing won't affect this.

Our lvl 36 heal wil heal for 350 for only 115mana for a ratio of 3.04 HP/per mana. And if you have Imporved healing and/or mana preservation its even betther.

Also often you wil be full HP and this spell would continue to drain you 3mana a tick even if you can't be heaed by the regen.

This is weird to make a Self HP reen spell costing more mana then a targatable healing spell.
▲ Page top
This spell is bad
QuoteReply
# Oct 07 2006 at 12:18 PM Rating: Decent
dylothe
Scholar
194 posts
While this spell is a drain on mana, during this period many paladins are now tanking for groups and even this excessive ratio is better during battle periods then having to try to cast greater heal in combat lowering your aggro. Now if your solo'n then its a different story as you have to heal yourself and keep a modest pool of mana whilst doing it. Remember mana potions, haste potions and the like and all this talk about the regeneration buff will seem mute. The new expansion TSS has proven without a doubt that mana regeneration for low levels is out there and in decent numbers and quanity. Look for them.
____________________________
In days gone by, I remember the flowers and the sky

# Mar 26 2004 at 11:27 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591785760770

Scholar

Only there. Go out and visit the world. From PoK, take the Great Divide stone, follow the north edge of the zone to the west and that should lead you to Thurgadin.

nice spell
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2004 at 11:59 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592790898615
120 posts
I have the regen I aug from the BB camp in and i use this, the regen is very nice, esp with C3, I was in EW last night hunting for a coldain ring, and i had this on most of the time, and when i was below 40, and had the mana, i would hit myself with a blast of Ethereal Cleansing and then go into battle.

Does anyone know if it stacks with Shammy/Druid regen spells? that would be some nice regen if so.
▲ Page top
Useful spell
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2003 at 2:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780436448
Scholar
23 posts
This spell is nice. Use it while medding for a slow regen or run it all the time when C3'ed (never let them see ya bleed!).

It's also good for any 18 minute timed mobs; just recast it after the mob goes down and when Divine Purpose runs out ya got about three minutes to get ready.
